name: Remo Notifier Source
description: Register this devcontainer's agentsh with the host's remo notifier (opt-in approval delivery).

notifierAddress.description: host:port of the notifier control plane on the container bridge.

agentshApiUrl.description: Notifier-reachable agentsh approvals base URL. Optional: when empty it is derived by convention as http://<sourceId>:<agentshPort>.

agentshPort.description: agentsh approvals port, used only when agentshApiUrl is derived by convention.

apiKey.description: Approver X-API-Key (inline). Prefer apiKeyFile to keep secrets out of devcontainer.json.

apiKeyFile.description: Path inside the container to read the approver key from at connect time.

sourceId.description: Stable source id (defaults to the container hostname).

labels.description: Optional comma-separated key=value labels for the status surface.
